main.description: A signalled transition on a goal (TASK-84/TASK-87). Published as a message on msg.topic.goals — an observation that goal <goal> moved, NOT the goal's current value. The status tracker (TASK-87) emits these by watching crew activity; any agent or human may emit one. It SIGNALS; it does not manage (ADR-0035): the current value lives in the goal.<id> artifact, which the owner — or, as a cooperative convenience, the tracker — sets. A goal.update for a goal with no artifact yet is a proposal to open one. Content is opaque to the bus.

goal.description: The goal-id this update concerns (matches the goal.<id> artifact).

state.description: The observed/new state: pending | active | blocked | done | dropped (same enum as goal.state).

progress.description: Optional short progress at this transition.

headline.description: Short line describing the transition / what was observed, e.g. 'canopus opened PR #143 -> active'.

ref.description: Optional ticket/PR/artifact that triggered the update.

by.description: Who/what signalled it (convenience label; the bus-stamped author is authoritative).
